3Word Count: 422Reading Level Correlations: Early Intervention Level 19Guided Reading Level KDRA Level 24Lexile ® 560LHorses have made our lives easier for thousands of years.
Find out how these beautiful, strong animals can run like the wind.
And, learn what they eat and where they live.

All About Horses Horses are fast, too.
They are one of the fastest animals in the world.
People like to watch horse races and guess which horse will run the fastest.
A horse ’ s powerful legs help the animal run far and jump high.
Some horses can run more than 50 miles per hour!
